description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and featuring a small landscaped yard at one end. The structure has a flat roof and large windows, allowing for ample natural light in the main living areas. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored materials, with some sections featuring wood paneling for visual contrast. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, with distinct living, sleeping, and utility areas. A driveway or paved area is present at one end, likely serving as the main entrance and parking space. The property is compact, efficiently utilizing its lot with minimal setbacks and a focus on privacy and outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat roof, wood-paneled exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard. The layout is open and efficient, with a driveway and landscaped area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the wooden privacy fence, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and a glimpse into the interior room arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous wooden fence and the flat roof, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backyard area, additional rooms, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
